context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: It was a cold winter morning. Snow covered the entire village like a white blanket.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: It was a cold winter morning. Snow covered the entire village like a white blanket.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: Little Anna put on her wool hat and warm coat before stepping outside.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: Little Anna put on her wool hat and warm coat before stepping outside.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: Anna and her brother Tom ran to the fireplace to warm up after playing in the snow.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: Anna and her brother Tom ran to the fireplace to warm up after playing in the snow.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: Their grandmother made hot chocolate with marshmallows by the fireplace.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: Their grandmother made hot chocolate with marshmallows by the fireplace.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: The children built a Snowman in the garden. They used a carrot for his nose.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: The children built a Snowman in the garden. They used a carrot for his nose.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: Anna gave the Snowman her old wool hat to keep him warm.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: Anna gave the Snowman her old wool hat to keep him warm.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: That night, the Snowman came alive under the bright moonlight.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: That night, the Snowman came alive under the bright moonlight.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: The Snowman took Anna on a magical sleigh ride through the winter forest.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: The Snowman took Anna on a magical sleigh ride through the winter forest.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: They flew over the snowy mountains and saw the Northern Lights dancing in the sky.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: They flew over the snowy mountains and saw the Cầu vồng dancing in the sky.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: The Snowman showed Anna the ice palace where the Snow Queen lived.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: The Snowman showed Anna the ice palace where the Snow Queen lived.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: The Snow Queen gave Anna a magical ice crystal that would never melt.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: The Snow Queen gave Anna a magical ice crystal that would never melt.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: Winter is the most magical season, the Snow Queen said with a gentle smile.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: Winter is the most magical season, the Snow Queen said with a gentle smile.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: As the sun rose, the Snowman began to melt. Anna held his carrot nose and cried.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: As the sun rose, the Snowman began to melt. Anna held his carrot nose and cried.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: Tom found Anna sitting by the fireplace, holding the carrot and the wool hat.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: Tom found Anna sitting by the fireplace, holding the carrot and the wool hat.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: Anna smiled and looked at the ice crystal. It sparkled like the snow outside.
context_safe_localized_text_pack.localized_content: Anna smiled and looked at the ice crystal. It sparkled like the snow outside.

context_safe_localized_text_pack.original_content: Next winter, I will build another Snowman, Anna whispered. And we will fly again.

contexts.sentence: It was a cold winter morning. Snow covered the entire village like a white blanket.
Anna and her brother Tom ran to the fireplace to warm up after playing in the snow.
The children built a Snowman in the garden. They used a carrot for his nose.
They flew over the snowy mountains and saw the Northern Lights dancing in the sky.
Anna smiled and looked at the ice crystal. It sparkled like the snow outside.
It was a cold winter morning. Snow covered the entire village like a white blanket.
The Snowman took Anna on a magical sleigh ride through the winter forest.
Winter is the most magical season, the Snow Queen said with a gentle smile.
Next winter, I will build another Snowman, Anna whispered. And we will fly again.
It was a cold winter morning. Snow covered the entire village like a white blanket.
Little Anna put on her wool hat and warm coat before stepping outside.
Anna and her brother Tom ran to the fireplace to warm up after playing in the snow.
Anna gave the Snowman her old wool hat to keep him warm.
The Snowman took Anna on a magical sleigh ride through the winter forest.
The Snowman showed Anna the ice palace where the Snow Queen lived.
The Snow Queen gave Anna a magical ice crystal that would never melt.
As the sun rose, the Snowman began to melt. Anna held his carrot nose and cried.
Tom found Anna sitting by the fireplace, holding the carrot and the wool hat.
Anna smiled and looked at the ice crystal. It sparkled like the snow outside.
Next winter, I will build another Snowman, Anna whispered. And we will fly again.

localization_log.rationale: Fireplaces are rare in Vietnamese homes. Wood-burning stoves (bếp củi) are the cultural equivalent.
Hot chocolate is uncommon in Vietnam. Chè (sweet soup) is a popular warm dessert for children.
Wool hats are rare in tropical Vietnam. The conical hat (nón lá) is iconic Vietnamese headwear.
Sleighs require snow and are unknown in Vietnam. Bicycles are a common childhood transport.
Northern Lights are not visible in Vietnam. Rainbows are a similarly magical sky phenomenon.
A warm coat is understandable but uncommon phrasing. Áo khoác (jacket) is more natural for Vietnamese children.
